name: 2P Frogless
setup: Be on a save file that hasn't opened the door in the room yet
notes: 2p Cap Kingdom BTT+TAS is only 15 frames away from being a 2:0x now

name: 2P City Hall Warp -> Enter People Room
setup: Hover over City Hall checkpoint
notes: This loses a frame to 1p TAS from cafe moon -> enter people room, but I couldn't figure out how to save that frame.

name: 2P Wire Shoot -> Enter Bullet Billding (Metro reroute)
setup: Capture the wire by the Odyssey
notes: The video has manual DSTA, but this can be cut from the time as NSCA will be used. This route saves over 5 seconds to BTT and opens the way for more improvements such as girder + wiggler.

name: Rango Fight
setup: Fly to the flag and run the script when the screen is brightly lit

name: Cap KFR
setup: Run the script while in the KFR. It will automatically restart the race.

name: Sinking Island
setup: `go SenobiTowerExStage 1 SeaWorldEX3a true`

name: Chests in SM64 Costume Room
setup: `go PeachWorldCostumeStage 2 CostumeEventWorldPeach true`

name: Rotating Maze v1
setup: `go CapRotatePackunExStage 2 kaitendokan true`
notes: Might be possible to get a cappy clip without ledge grabbing, but that's annoyingly precise

name: Poison Room Crossing Captureless
setup: Leave the poison room in cap kingdom
notes: With the use of poison rolls, which allow mario to roll and longjump off of upward sloped poison by diving into it, it is possible to jump the gap between the starting and ending areas of the poison tide sub-area. This allows both the "Skimming the Poison Tide" and "Slipping Through the Poison Tide" moons to be collected without capturing a paragoomba, bringing the minimum captures maximum moon count from 516 to 518. This is the first time a new moon has been proven for minimum captures since October of 2021!

name: Enter Fight -> Way to Escape (bowser fight v2)
setup: Open the door in the chapel and start script when you gain control of mario (make sure you have real cutscenes)

name: Moon Kingdom Bowser Fight
setup: Open the door in the chapel and start script when you gain control of mario (make sure you have real cutscenes)
notes: Might not work if you get a bad load, explanation: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tQEMD9YPmKYK9y8IDeKzCwZZwT-kkSh94AhFDN9qFjU/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tQEMD9YPmKYK9y8IDeKzCwZZwT-kkSh94AhFDN9qFjU/edit?usp=sharing)
